raw_messages.content:
# Current Date Context
The current date is 2024-05-15 (Wednesday). When users mention dates without specifying the year, always assume they refer to 2024. All flight searches and reservations should use 2024 dates unless explicitly stated otherwise.
Hi, I need to make some changes to my upcoming trip from Houston to Denver. I want to find the fastest return trip on the same day as my departure, which is May 27. Can you assist me with that?

I'm okay with a connecting flight. I just want the fastest return trip on the same day, including stopover time. Could you find me the best option?
